textByHash.016e3fdbd1bccc3d88ba1996a3850d2a49512ec0: But... I don't have a mortgage! I built this house myself!
textByHash.0d7b4f5545a29664aa6562d7407af05aac4bfeae: I leave town for just five months, and ALREADY he can't manage.
textByHash.131fe6db7a4844fb425f15bebb8cef5ac81e09ff: What are you talking about? I can see you've got it with you!
textByHash.2b07e9ac5eada2ff4038bfce6d386124134b8e73: Maybe if you know what this task is, you can get rid of the ghost. I'm not making any guarantees mind you, but it is the best I can do right now.
textByHash.32220f760585cc3989e98de4454bd1530556c0d4: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! It's a good job I've got a spare.
textByHash.3cc6c04a7483b6e40f07b4499eb69236f2273a46: You come here wasting my time... Has it even occurred to you that you've got it stored somewhere? Now GO AWAY!
textByHash.5586a73f56ef24041e775197fdc543587be8d613: I suppose I'd better talk to you then. What problems has he got himself into this time?
textByHash.5b4885ca3548178ba41a5780424be9ca9cd6294d: What? What houses? What ARE you talking about???
textByHash.5c1be7eabe40fc098d198e87234233cde90cba5d: Oh, thank you Saradomin! I will meditate on what this message means!
textByHash.64fc13aefd4e973ef64880e9a343c4aa48b7b24d: Yeah. For example, when we were trainee priests he kept on getting stuck up bell ropes.
textByHash.7293a08bc26e8db2c73bf2b4beddf5ed9eef6974: It is an Amulet of Ghostspeak.
textByHash.7f7714d68f6b39e362af35ea5d5060a6097e116a: So called, because when you wear it you can speak to ghosts. A lot of ghosts are doomed to be ghosts because they have left some important task uncompleted.
textByHash.8e9ea280e63b62026029346b718565ee4eaae465: I don't care! I'm still meditating!
textByHash.970e54a1a1861b7cdf1d6e725e5ca00d354583e4: Tell you what I can do though; take this amulet.
textByHash.9a1dc15fd96e111d82eaaa50439e7a50467b96b2: At last! The voice of Saradomin! My years of meditation have paid off!
textByHash.a6b29c8fa9c5fae5f030a4df4f2947704d84c8c6: O mighty Saradomin! What is your message to me?
textByHash.b9dc7597641fcb36cf5a8a9eea2e45da8e7f05a2: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! Now clear some space in your inventory and I'll give you another one.
textByHash.c048ed075ebdd9b7140e2a7d13317ead530d5d7b: Oh... go away and stop wasting my time!
textByHash.d9a35b1f7a9375babb9a1c8055c30e1a268d6e68: Well, I can't go back and exorcise it. I vowed not to leave this place. Until I had done a full two years of prayer and meditation.
textByHash.f0a2bf214dea67b979cb76095c173367f61df564: Anyway. I don't have time for chitchat. What's his problem THIS time?
